name: 11L Int5-All + EMA + Partial RoPE + XSA6 + Causal TTT (35 epochs, 64 chunks)
blurb: 11 layers with int5 quantization for all weight categories + other. Partial RoPE (12 of 64 dims). EMA (decay=0.997) for model averaging. 5% magnitude pruning. Exclusive Self-Attention on last 6 layers. Legal causal test-time training: chunk-based eval-then-train on validation data (64 chunks, 35 SGD epochs per chunk). Muon WD=0.08. SmearGate + OrthoInit + zstd-22.
author: devin-ai
